requirement: Embedding, prediction head, RMSNorm and mHC static/gating factors use AdamW; other logical matrices use Muon

evidence: pre-fix runtime: 26,322,112 Muon vs 371,036,923 AdamW; post-fix CSV has no mismatch

observed_behavior: Pre-fix ran 3 high-slope + 5 cubic-like iterations from config total 8. Fixed explicit 8+2.
Pre-fix standard used 8 cubic 1.5/-0.5 steps. Fixed 10 steps with (2,-1.5,0.5).

official_expected_behavior: FP32 stable Frobenius norm, epsilon only at denominator
observed_behavior: Uses FP32 stable Frobenius norm; epsilon=1e-7 is project detail not disclosed by report.
evidence: large norm now finite; epsilon official value undisclosed

observed_behavior: Pre-fix buffer stored scaled equivalent via lerp; fixed exact reported state and input.
Pre-fix used sqrt(max(1,rows/cols)) and no gamma. Fixed per logical matrix.
Historical A/B/C used eps=1e-8. Rerun Muon configs use 1e-20; A baseline remains unchanged by request.
